mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, TO_CHAR(A.DEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS DEL_DT_FORMATTED FROM EVA_POOL_M_DEL A WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEL_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{sStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{sEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND A.NAME LIKE '%' || #{sNameEmail} || '%'
ORDER BY A.DEL_DT DESC
